fl0m says he hates Inferno in CS2, but deep down, it’s his guilty pleasure. While he complains about the lighting, audio, and utility, the real reason he keeps playing it might be the chickens. Inferno is packed with them, and fl0m, a known fan of chicken wings, can’t resist. Every cluck reminds him of his favorite snack. So while he rants on stream, the truth is clear—he doesn’t hate Inferno, he’s just hungry.
